title: Blood Devil
description:
it's a super power data pack , with 6 super power in the devil armor.
craftable in crafting table by using redstone block and netherite armor and sword.
version from 1.16-1.20.4
body:
This time I present you "Blood Devil Data Pack".
its a Super Power Data pack.

Blood Devil Data pack work by Creating Blood Armor set,
All recipes are mention in the images,
Blood Devil have 5 powers with 1 Sneak + Jump redstone power,
after activation of Armor eye becomes white and health will be 100hp,
Blood Devil Texture pack have glowing effects [Emission],
after activation all 5 powers are divided into 5 Slots,
first 5 slots are the powers,
2 slot works when you hit any entity,
other 3 slots work without hitting any entity just left click.

All 5 powers and redstone are-

1] Blood Curse        [Touch any entity will be cursed]
2] Destructive Death  [Touch any entity will be blasted]
3] Blood Shield       [create a protective shield around you]
4] Devil Mode         [gives you extra Strength, Speed , Regeneration and Health with super jump boost]
5] Normal Mode        [Clear redstone with your extra Strength, Speed , Regeneration and Health with super jump boost]
6] Redstone           [By Sneak + Jump you will be able to create redstone blocks]
7] Sword              [holding the sword gives you super god speed with 1024 damage but makes you 1hp]

Please Read Everything Carefully Before Using the Data Pack

Optifine required for texture pack.
Without Optifine texture pack may not work properly.

Blood Devil Have two Packs without both packs Blood Devil may not work properly

1] Blood Devil DP [Data Pack]
2] Blood Devil RP [Texture Pack]

Create new world with Data pack and reload it [/reload]
or you can use in your old world by first reload it [/reload]


Crafting recipe of Blood Devil Armor Set-

1] Helmet      [1 Netherite Helmet + 8 packed redstone surrounding the Helmet]
2] Chestplate  [1 Netherite Chestplate + 8 packed redstone surrounding the Chestplate]
3] Leggings    [1 Netherite Leggings + 8 packed redstone surrounding the Leggings]
4] Boots       [1 Netherite Boots + 8 packed redstone surrounding the Boots]
5] Sword       [1 Netherite Sword + 8 packed redstone surrounding the Sword]


This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO 1.20.4

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Blood Devil DataPack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
